title: Meme Music Pack
description: Changes the music discs of Minecraft to funny goofy music.
body: Changes all the Minecraft music discs to funny goofy meme music, mostly my taste, credit to youtuber Rocket-Pr0pelled-Guy, and my friend GodzillaClub1954 for ideas of some music. Pack includes, APT, Assumtions, Better call goofy ah saul, Bye Bye Bye, The only hing they fear is you, Dream Speedrun theme, Free Bird, Funky Town, Gangdom Style, Gangsters paradise, Gas Gas Gas, Halo 3 Warthog Theme, Its going down know, Luna Bala, Oh Yeah, OIIA OIIA, Passo Bem Solto, Stereo Love, Y.M.C.A, and you Spin Me Round .
